# video-use Third-Party Notice

The optional renderer adapter is designed for the Browser Use `video-use` project:

- Source: `https://github.com/browser-use/video-use`
- Pinned snapshot: `92c2b34e44c205cbc2acae7f6ca7c1c219d5dd66`

The upstream source is not vendored in this repository. The full license text remains in the pinned external checkout. Any distribution that includes a copy or substantial portion of upstream software must include the MIT notice and permission text.
